# Batho Travels

Batho Travels is a South African travel-planning and structured-savings platform.

Primary URL: https://bathotravels.co.za
Locale: en-ZA
Currency: ZAR
App name: Batho Travels
Core offer: Travel the World. Pay Over Time. Zero Debt.

## What Batho Travels Does

- Helps South African travellers plan custom trips with an AI Trip Planner.
- Turns budget, interests, trip type, seasonality, cost estimates, and itinerary assumptions into a structured savings plan.
- Lets travellers save monthly before travel with 0% interest.
- Uses sequential staged funding: flights first, then stay, then experiences.
- Supports group trip coordination with independent participant savings shares.
- Supports custom destination requests reviewed by operations.

## What Batho Travels Is Not

- Batho Travels is not a lender.
- Batho Travels does not run credit checks.
- Batho Travels does not issue loans.
- Batho Travels does not create debt for travellers.
- Batho Travels does not charge late fees.
- Batho Travels does not sell a prebuilt trip catalogue in V1.

## AI Trip Planner

The AI Trip Planner is the hero product. It suggests destinations only from a traveller's budget, interests, trip type, and seasonality. Planner output is stored as structured JSON with:

- destination
- recommended months
- trip type
- estimated cost breakdown
- itinerary
- assumptions
- savings handoff

Costs are estimates until confirmed through the active travel and supplier workflow.

## Savings Rules

- Default plan length: 12 months.
- Maximum plan length: 12 months.
- Minimum domestic plan: 3 months.
- Minimum Africa regional plan: 6 months.
- Minimum long-haul international plan: 12 months.
- Grace period: 7 days.
- Cancellation management fee: R500.
- Late payment handling is supportive: grace, pause, adjust, or cancel.

## Copy Rules

Approved reservation copy:

- Reserve your spot
- Secure your travel plan early

Payment copy should stay provider agnostic:

- trusted providers, including card and EFT options

Avoid implying confirmed inventory before a trip is fully funded and booked with suppliers.

- https://bathotravels.co.za/sitemap.xml
- https://bathotravels.co.za/robots.txt
